channel.title: friendly.atheist TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from friendly.atheist

item.title: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has dramatically reduced the number of religious and non-religious identities recognized by the U.S. military, eliminating categories like Humanist, atheist, Pagan, and others. This accomplishes nothing. #PeteHegseth #Milit
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has dramatically reduced the number of religious and non-religious identities recognized by the U.S. military, eliminating categories like Humanist, atheist, Pagan, and others. This accomplishes nothing. #PeteHegseth #Milit

item.title: A famous bus route in Poland once let tourists take Bus 666 to the town of Hel. After complaints from conservative Christians, the route number was changed in 2023. But now FlixBus has revived Route 666 to Hel—and somehow made it even funnier. The total

item.title: After pressure from Utah's Mormon senators, the Pentagon once again updated its list of recognized religious affiliations in the military. But the new version still creates bizarre categories. Instead of reflecting America's religious diversity, the list

item.title: I just delivered a secular invocation at the DuPage County (IL) board meeting. Here's what I said and why I feel it's important to participate in this sort of ritual. #SecularInvocations #ChurchStateSeparation #Atheism #PrideMonth #BoardMeeting
item.description: I just delivered a secular invocation at the DuPage County (IL) board meeting. Here's what I said and why I feel it's important to participate in this sort of ritual. #SecularInvocations #ChurchStateSeparation #Atheism #PrideMonth #BoardMeeting

item.title: Christian Nationalist activist Tim Barton claimed an early American preacher inspired the Declaration of Independence by using language about "inalienable rights." Just one problem: The quote Barton cited doesn't appear in the book he was holding. This i

item.title: John Dehlin, creator of the Mormon Stories podcast, has officially responded to the LDS Church's lawsuit against him. The case is shaping up as a major fight over criticism, free speech, and who gets to control the conversation about Mormonism. #Mormon #
item.description: John Dehlin, creator of the Mormon Stories podcast, has officially responded to the LDS Church's lawsuit against him. The case is shaping up as a major fight over criticism, free speech, and who gets to control the conversation about Mormonism. #Mormon #

item.title: Last year, a Tennessee Christian school punished senior Morgan Armstrong after she came out as a lesbian, banning her from graduation and threatening her future. But after Morgan fought back in court, the school has now erased her suspension, promised no

item.title: Texas Justice of the Peace Dianne Hensley refused to perform same-sex weddings because of her Christian beliefs, even though she was acting as a government official. A court has now awarded her $10,000 in damages and $630,000 in legal fees. The case raise
item.description: Texas Justice of the Peace Dianne Hensley refused to perform same-sex weddings because of her Christian beliefs, even though she was acting as a government official. A court has now awarded her $10,000 in damages and $630,000 in legal fees. The case raise

item.title: Trump's "Religious Liberty Commission" just released its final report, and instead of defending religious freedom for everyone, it pushes policies that would give conservative Christianity more power in government. From attacking church-state separation
item.description: Trump's "Religious Liberty Commission" just released its final report, and instead of defending religious freedom for everyone, it pushes policies that would give conservative Christianity more power in government. From attacking church-state separation

item.title: A new Pew Research survey found that 61% of Americans support allowing public school teachers to lead students in prayer, including 8% who think participation should be required. That's a major shift in public opinion and a warning sign for supporters of
